column2: Um, hello, ma'am.
column4: I'm naming the spear you pick up for the interaction "Baculiphyca"

column2: Ma'am?!
I wore the robe so I'd be relatively androgynous!
I'm so sorry!
The ghost in the cave--Doloris--she--
Oh, that's understandable. Doloris has a very strong personality.
I don't blame her. What else can you do if you're a self-assigned gatekeeper
to the ENGINE for however long she's been down here?
Thank you for your understanding.
Are you... also a gatekeeper?
Oh, no. I'm just waiting here for my companion. When the ENGINE shifted
and swallowed up this giant pool area, we got separated, so I'm waiting here,
where we were when there was... a lot less water.
That's terrible. I hope you can reunite.
Thank you.
If...you're not going anywhere, can we move past you to take the bridge?
What? Of course not. I can't move until he gets back.
Um. Okay, but we need to progress.
Can we just squeeze by? Pretty please?
If I move, he  could miss me.
I'm not going anywhere until he gets back.
Not even a step?
Absolutely not. Like I said, I need him to be able to find me.
Of course.
If we... find proof of your companion somewhere else, could we
direct you to them?
In that incredibly unlikely chance that you find him first, then yes,
I'll take evidence.
Great. We'll be back in a moment.
If I... find proof of your companion somewhere else, could I
direct you to them?
In that incredibly unlikely chance that you find him first, then yes,
I'll take evidence.
Great. I'll be back in a moment.
I'm not moving until my companion is back!
This is the spear of your companion. He was trapped behind
one of those mermaid monsters.
So Heinrey is alive?
He said he'd come to you once he was recovered.
HOW does ghost recovery even work..?
Oh, wonderful, thank you for letting me know.
Can we get by you now?
Oh, of course!
Thanks again! Good luck getting where you're going!
Um, hello.
Can we get past you?
Ah, sorry. I can't go anywhere until my companion returns.
We got lost when this pool suddenly appeared and I don't want him
to miss me if he comes through.
Can't you just step to the side?
Absolutely not!
(Fuck.)
If I find... something... that proves he's on his way, can we get past?
In that incredibly unlikely chance that you find him first, then yes,
I'll take evidence.
Great. One second.
I'm not moving until my companion is back!
This is your guy's spear. He was trapped behind
one of those mermaid monsters.
So Heinrey is alive?
He said he'd come to you once he was recovered.
Oh, wonderful, thank you for letting me know.
Can we get by now?
Oh, of course!
